description: The task instructions are presented to the user, typing out line by line on a dark background.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text appearing line by line, providing instructions for the travel planning task.

description: An 'Open' button appears below the instructions, allowing the user to proceed to the test website.
frame_description: The instruction screen now displays a circular 'Open' button in the center.

description: The user moves the cursor towards the 'Open' button and pauses briefly before clicking.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button on the dark instruction screen.

description: The user clicks the 'Open' button to launch the website.
frame_description: The 'Open' button is clicked, initiating a new tab load.

description: A new browser tab opens and loads the Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the dark instruction page to the white Google homepage.

description: The user moves the cursor to the top of the browser window, hovering over the open tabs.
frame_description: The cursor lingers near the tab bar at the top of the browser.

description: The user clicks on the 'Askable Sessions' tab to refer back to the instructions.
frame_description: The user selects the previous tab containing the task instructions.

description: The browser view switches to the 'Askable Sessions' tab.
frame_description: The screen switches back to the dark instruction page.

description: The user clicks back on the 'Google' tab to continue with the task.
frame_description: The user clicks the Google tab to return to the search engine.

description: The browser view switches back to the Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen switches back to the Google homepage.

description: The user clicks inside the Google search input field to begin searching.
frame_description: The cursor is clicked inside the central search box on Google.

description: Upon clicking the search box, a dropdown menu with trending searches and suggestions appears.
frame_description: A list of trending search terms appears below the search input field.
